notes: Static role templates are structured inputs only.

preventability_opportunity_explanation: Preventability opportunity is a proxy derived from material gap strength, decision weight, information clock, and burden modifiers. It is not a claim of clinical harm prevention.

what_was_known: At decision time, the only known missing input is low expected relevance and higher burden.
what_was_missing: Low-value background detail remains missing but is not material to the posture under review.
what_would_have_changed_the_discussion: No next-best-information item was ranked above the materiality threshold.
what_hospital_based_monitoring_or_treatm: The receipt records whether a hospital-based path had a specific monitoring, information, or therapy-response target in the current-time facts.
what_non_inpatient_alternatives_might_ad: The receipt records whether support, follow-up access, return access, and recheck feasibility were represented in the current-time facts.
commission_concerns: No commission-lane concern was raised by the deterministic graph.
omission_concerns: No omission-lane concern was raised by the deterministic graph.
therapy_response_concerns: No therapy-response concern was raised by the deterministic graph.
why_the_graph_selected_the_posture: The graph selected PROCEED_WITH_UNCERTAINTY_DISCLOSURE from bounded node values, with decision weight 0.25 and preventability opportunity 0.0.
